name: Watkins Caramel Apple Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Use lite or regular cream cheese. The already-creamed variety works well.
2. Add brown sugar, increasing to 1/3 cup if desired.
3. Only Watkins brand makes Caramel Extract.
4. Mix all ingredients until smooth and creamy.
5. Chill the mixture and serve with sliced apples.
6. Sliced pears and green seedless grapes also pair nicely.
7. To prevent browning, treat apple slices with lemon juice or a commercial product.
